zh.lifeSummary: 當John Crawford於1245年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾可拉福爾越恩時，他的父親Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun25歲，母親Alicia de Dalsallock15歲。他於1260年之前與Helen Hadden在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年在蘇格蘭享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Crawford于1245年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾可拉福爾越恩时，他的父亲Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun25岁，母亲Alicia de Dalsallock15岁。他于1260年之前与Helen Hadden在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年在苏格兰享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Crawford was born in 1245, in Crawfordjohn, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, was 25 and his mother, Alicia de Dalsallock, was 15. He married Helen Hadden before 1260, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1308, in Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Crawford est né en 1245, à Crawfordjohn, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alicia de Dalsallock, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Helen Hadden avant 1260, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1308, à Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Crawford 1245 in Crawfordjohn, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun 25 und seine Mutter Alicia de Dalsallock 15. Er hat vor 1260 in Scotland Helen Hadden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1308 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Crawford è nato il nel 1245 nel Crawfordjohn, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alicia de Dalsallock, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Helen Hadden prima del 1260, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1308, nel Scotland, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Crawfordが1245年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォージョンで生まれた時，父Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudounは25歳，母Alicia de Dalsallockは15歳であった。1260年以前にスコットランドでHelen Haddenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年にスコットランドで63歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Crawford(이)가 1245년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드존에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia de Dalsallock(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1260년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Helen Hadden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 스컷랜드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Crawford nasceu em 1245, em Crawfordjohn, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alicia de Dalsallock, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Hadden antes 1260, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1308, em Scotland, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Crawford родился в 1245 г. в местности кравфорджон, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia de Dalsallock, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Hadden перед 1260 г. в местности Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1308 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
